## Verses (19)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Give ear, O Keeper of Israel, guiding Joseph like a flock; you who have your seat on the winged ones, let your glory be seen. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh, let your strength be awake from sleep, and come as our salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Take us back again, O God; let us see the shining of your face, and let us be safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | O Lord God of armies, how long will your wrath be burning against the rest of your people? | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | You have given them the bread of weeping for food; for their drink you have given them sorrow in great measure. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | You make us a cause of war among our neighbours; our haters are laughing at us among themselves. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Take us back again, O God of armies; let us see the shining of your face, and let us be safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | You took a vine out of Egypt: driving out the nations, and planting it in their land. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | You made ready a place for it, so that it might take deep root, and it sent out its branches over all the land. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The mountains were covered with its shade, and the great trees with its branches. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | It sent out its arms to the Sea, and its branches to the River. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Why are its walls broken down by your hands, so that all who go by may take its fruit? | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | It is uprooted by the pigs from the woods, the beasts of the field get their food from it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Come back, O God of armies: from heaven let your eyes be turned to this vine, and give your mind to it, | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Even to the tree which was planted by your right hand, and to the branch which you made strong for yourself. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | It is burned with fire; it is cut down: they are made waste by the wrath of your face. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Let your hand be on the man of your right hand, on the son of man whom you made strong for yourself. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | So will we not be turned back from you; keep us in life, and we will give praise to your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Take us back, O Lord God of armies; let us see the shining of your face, and let us be safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
